jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Cognizant
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Cognizant in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cognizant:
Cognizant is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant!
